pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and setup_libreoffice_base.sh specify this path
Task description explicitly specifies this name
Direct query on Chinook SQLite database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE GenreId IN (1, 3) AND Milliseconds > 300000 AND Composer IS NOT NULL
Direct query on Chinook SQLite database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE GenreId IN (1, 3) AND Milliseconds > 300000 AND Composer IS NOT NULL
Rock is GenreId 1 in Chinook database; must appear in query for genre filtering
Metal is GenreId 3 in Chinook database; must appear in query for genre filtering
Criterion requires Milliseconds > 300000 (5 minutes); this constant must appear in query
Query must filter for Composer IS NOT NULL; field name must appear in query
Task description requires sorting by duration descending; ORDER BY keyword must appear in query

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real music store dataset (275 artists, 347 albums, 3503 tracks, 59 customers, 412 invoices) downloaded from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. The query for Rock (GenreId 1) or Metal (GenreId 3) tracks with duration > 300000 milliseconds (5 minutes) and non-null Composer returns exactly 500 matching tracks (347 Rock + 153 Metal), not the 280-300 claimed. All required keywords (Rock, Metal, 300000, Composer, ORDER BY) are necessary for the query.
